Twenty One Pilots · Clancy · 2024

Hermano

This is it. The semester that counts.
Not the one with deadlines and exams —
the one where you finally get to be everything you already are.

You are more capable than you know
and more incredible than you let yourself believe.

Use every day. Use every afternoon.
Explode with your potential — the world is ready for you.

And on the days it isn't? I am.

If they ever come calling for your head,
I'm coming through.

My house is yours. My corner is yours. Always.

Start fresh. This is where it gets good. ✦

Andy · 19 · 03 · 2026

Para mi hermano Heiner Herrera
